Add Azure Utilization Disclaimer (Azure migrations only):
- The Azure utilization numbers represent our best estimation of the cost of running Azure government resources required for the application given the design specified in previous sections.
- This estimation is based on a limited analysis of the application and our experience operating applications in Azure CCE.
- Azure government resources can be scaled vertically or horizontally based on actual system demands so consumption will vary and can be tuned to actual need.
- Pricing for Azure DOD Regions is not published in publicly available Azure pricing resources.
- All prices are for Azure US Government Virginia Region as of the date of the analysis as published at https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/pricing/
